tool_input.description: Check tracked spec files on branch

tool_input.content:
# Plan: Fix MWPW-190803 merge conflicts with main + gitignore cleanup

## Context
Branch MWPW-190803 has 7 commits diverged from main, and main has 3 new commits. There are 2 merge conflicts, both in build artifacts (`web-components/dist/mas.js` and `web-components/dist/merch-card.js`). The branch also has tracked spec files that should be removed from git tracking.

## Steps

### 1. Stash current work on MWPW-190918
- `git stash` to save uncommitted changes on current branch

### 2. Switch to MWPW-190803
- `git checkout MWPW-190803`

### 3. Merge main, resolve dist conflicts
- `git merge main`
- Resolve dist conflicts by accepting "theirs" (main's version) since we'll rebuild:
  - `git checkout --theirs web-components/dist/mas.js web-components/dist/merch-card.js`
  - `git add web-components/dist/`
- The `.gitignore` merge is auto-resolved (no conflict)

### 4. Rebuild web-components dist
- `npm run build` in `web-components/` to regenerate dist files with both main and branch changes

### 5. Add `/specs/` to .gitignore (already present) + remove tracked spec files
- `/specs/` is already in .gitignore — just need to untrack the files:
  - `git rm -r --cached specs/ .specify/`
- Verify `.specify/` is also in .gitignore (main removed it — add back if needed)

### 6. Complete the merge commit
- Stage everything and commit the merge

### 7. Return to MWPW-190918
- `git checkout MWPW-190918`
- `git stash pop` to restore work

## Files Modified
- `web-components/dist/mas.js` — rebuild resolves conflict
- `web-components/dist/merch-card.js` — rebuild resolves conflict
- `.gitignore` — auto-merged (may need `.specify/` re-added)
- Untracked: `specs/MWPW-190803/*`, `.specify/memory/constitution.md`

## Verification
- `git log --oneline -5` confirms merge commit
- `git status` shows clean working tree
- `git diff main..MWPW-190803 --stat` shows expected changes

allowedPrompts.prompt: git stash, checkout, merge, add, commit, status, log, diff operations
npm run build in web-components directory
git checkout --theirs to resolve dist conflicts

tool_input.content:
#!/bin/bash
cd /Users/axelcurenobasurto/Web/mas
git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/contracts/settings-transformer.md
git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/data-model.md
git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/plan.md
git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/research.md
git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/spec.md
git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/tasks.md

tool_input.description: Verify all spec files are untracked
Untrack file using update-index instead of rm

tool_input.command: git update-index --force-remove specs/MWPW-190803/data-model.md && git update-index --force-remove specs/MWPW-190803/plan.md && git update-index --force-remove specs/MWPW-190803/research.md && git update-index --force-remove specs/MWPW-190803/spec.md && git update-index --force-remove specs/MWPW-190803/tasks.md

tool_input.description: Verify all spec files are untracked

tool_input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Merge main into MWPW-190803, rebuild dist, untrack spec files

Add /specs/ and .specify/ to .gitignore and remove tracked spec files.
EOF
)"
git checkout MWPW-190918 && git stash pop
tool_input.description: Return to MWPW-190918 and restore stashed work

tool_input.content:
# Plan: Push MWPW-190803 merge fix to PR #705

## Context
PR #705 (MWPW-190803) has conflicts with main and tracked spec files. We already completed the local work in the previous conversation turn:
- Merged main into MWPW-190803
- Resolved dist conflicts (`web-components/dist/mas.js`, `web-components/dist/merch-card.js`) by rebuilding
- Added `/specs/` and `.specify/` to `.gitignore`
- Untracked 8 spec files from git index
- Commit `369845b71` exists locally but hasn't been pushed

## Steps

### 1. Push MWPW-190803 to origin
- `git push origin MWPW-190803`

### 2. Verify PR #705 is conflict-free
- `gh pr view 705 --json mergeable`

## Verification
- PR #705 shows no conflicts on GitHub
- Spec files no longer appear in the PR diff

allowedPrompts.prompt: git checkout and push MWPW-190803 branch
gh pr view to verify PR status
